hooks.command: bash -c 'cd "${CLAUDE_WORKING_DIRECTORY:-.}" && STAGED_GO=$(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR -- "*.go" | head -1) && if [ -n "$STAGED_GO" ]; then UNSTAGED_GO=$(git diff --name-only -- "*.go" | head -1) && if [ -n "$UNSTAGED_GO" ]; then echo "Warning: unstaged Go changes detected — lint may flag code not in this commit" >&2; fi && BASE=$(git merge-base HEAD main 2>/dev/null || echo HEAD~1) && golangci-lint run --new-from-rev="$BASE" --timeout=5m 2>&1; fi'
